'''mabuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zendik|zendik]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zendik|zendik]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mabuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæbizhith|mæbizhith]] || [[word:mæbizhij|mæbizhij]] || [[word:mæbizhish|mæbizhish]] || [[word:mæbizhi|mæbizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabubuzhuth|mabubuzhuth]] || [[word:mabubuzhuj|mabubuzhuj]] || [[word:mabubuzhush|mabubuzhush]] || [[word:mabubuzhu|mabubuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabuzhuth|mabuzhuth]] || [[word:mabuzhuj|mabuzhuj]] || [[word:mabuzhush|mabuzhush]] || [[word:mabuzhu|mabuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabufzhuth|mabufzhuth]] || [[word:mabufzhuj|mabufzhuj]] || [[word:mabufzhush|mabufzhush]] || [[word:mabufzhuf|mabufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mabuzhuthu|mabuzhuthu]] || [[word:mabuzhuju|mabuzhuju]] || [[word:mabuzhushu|mabuzhushu]] || [[word:mabuzhuku|mabuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mabuzhuth|mabuzhuth]] || [[word:mabuzhuj|mabuzhuj]] || [[word:mabuzhush|mabuzhush]] || [[word:mabuzhu|mabuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mabuzhuthul|mabuzhuthul]] || [[word:mabuzhujul|mabuzhujul]] || [[word:mabuzhushul|mabuzhushul]] || [[word:mabuzhukul|mabuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mabuzhuthuthu|mabuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:mabuzhujuju|mabuzhujuju]] || [[word:mabuzhushushu|mabuzhushushu]] || [[word:mabuzhuku|mabuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mabuzhuthun|mabuzhuthun]] || [[word:mabuzhujun|mabuzhujun]] || [[word:mabuzhushun|mabuzhushun]] || [[word:mabuzhukun|mabuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mabuzhuthuoro|mabuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:mabuzhujuoro|mabuzhujuoro]] || [[word:mabuzhushuoro|mabuzhushuoro]] || [[word:mabuzhukuoro|mabuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
